project_type: Next.js 16 web application with React 19, Tailwind v4, and shadcn/ui
test_framework: No test framework configured (no test script in package.json)
verification_instructions: Run typecheck and build from osai-web/ directory. Both must pass with zero errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. No Docker needed.
contribution_requirements: Branch from main, implement changes, commit locally. Do NOT push.
key_patterns: Custom CSS design system in globals.css with CSS variables. theme.css provides shadcn/ui tokens that override some globals.css variables (notably --accent). Pages use a mix of custom CSS classes and Tailwind utility classes. The .sidebar-nav-item.active .nav-icon rule uses var(--accent) which resolves to shadcn's #1c1c1c (dark) instead of the intended #0099ff blue.
directory_structure: osai-web/app/ contains page routes. osai-web/components/ has shared components. globals.css is the primary design system file. theme.css adds shadcn/Tailwind tokens.
